method_description: Conventional diesel road freight service benchmark, spanning medium and heavy road freight at a national-average level.
evidence_summary: Service calibration uses official BITRE passenger-km or tonne-km and official Australian road-energy totals; pathway direction uses Australian EV and road-freight studies.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis. Incumbent methods are calibrated to aggregate Australian road energy and freight/passenger task data; transition methods reflect Australian drivetrain efficiency and cost evidence with smoothed milestone trajectories.
review_notes: 2025 coefficient reproduces roughly 36 MtCO2e road-freight emissions when combined with BITRE road tonne-km.

method_description: Improved diesel road freight with better vehicle efficiency, logistics and utilisation but still liquid-fuel based.
evidence_summary: Service calibration uses official BITRE passenger-km or tonne-km and official Australian road-energy totals; pathway direction uses Australian EV and road-freight studies.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis. Incumbent methods are calibrated to aggregate Australian road energy and freight/passenger task data; transition methods reflect Australian drivetrain efficiency and cost evidence with smoothed milestone trajectories.
review_notes: Transitional method capturing the abatement that can be obtained without full drivetrain switch.

method_description: Battery-electric road freight service suitable first for urban, depot-based and shorter-haul tasks and later for a wider share of freight.
evidence_summary: Service calibration uses official BITRE passenger-km or tonne-km and official Australian road-energy totals; pathway direction uses Australian EV and road-freight studies.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis. Incumbent methods are calibrated to aggregate Australian road energy and freight/passenger task data; transition methods reflect Australian drivetrain efficiency and cost evidence with smoothed milestone trajectories.
review_notes: Coefficient is a nationalised average across heterogeneous freight tasks; should be refined with payload class splits in Phase 2.

method_description: Hydrogen fuel-cell freight service for longer-range or harder-to-electrify road freight tasks.
evidence_summary: Service calibration uses official BITRE passenger-km or tonne-km and official Australian road-energy totals; pathway direction uses Australian EV and road-freight studies.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis. Incumbent methods are calibrated to aggregate Australian road energy and freight/passenger task data; transition methods reflect Australian drivetrain efficiency and cost evidence with smoothed milestone trajectories.
review_notes: Useful as a freight sensitivity method where battery range or charging-infrastructure limits bind.
